title: Nutty Crumbly Lard Crumbe
description: This decadent German dish features a rich blend of lard and toasted nuts for an indulgent treat that's perfect as a breakfast or snack.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine the lard, chopped almonds, sugar, and baking powder. Mix well until a crumbly texture is achieved.
Divide the mixture into small portions and shape them into flat discs using your hands or a rolling pin for even distribution of ingredients.
Place each disc on a lined baking sheet and bake in the oven for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
Remove from the oven, let cool slightly before serving as a snack or breakfast treat.
